app.loadingHint: Fetching your data — this may take a moment.

mobileNav.moreDesc: Venues, food orders, Face ID, and account

mobile.apiOfflineLan: Backend not reachable. On your PC run cd backend && npm start, then open {{url}} (must show {"status":"ok"}).
mobile.apiOfflineNative: Cannot reach the FlowTic API at {{url}}. Start the backend on your PC and use live reload (CAPACITOR_SERVER_URL) or set VITE_API_URL before building.

banner.verifyEmail: Verify your email to unlock the full FlowTic experience.

footer.blurb: Reimagining the way you plan, discover, and live events — with AI-powered Face ID entry, a verified resale market, and an immersive cinematic interface.

hero.slogan: Why wait in lines when you can just walk in?
hero.subtitle: From intimate weddings to stadium concerts — book, host, and live every event on one seamless all-in-one platform, with Face ID entry, AI concierge, and verified white-market resale.

auth.signInSubtitle: Access your tickets, events, and AI experience.
auth.oauthNotConfigured: Google sign-in requires GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in backend/.env (see docs/GOOGLE_SIGNIN.md).
auth.oauthGoogleDisabled: Google sign-in is not configured on the server
auth.oauthAppleDisabled: Apple sign-in is not configured on the server
auth.oauthMissingToken: Sign-in did not return a session. Try again.
auth.oauthSessionFailed: Signed in with provider but could not load your profile. Try again.
auth.sessionExpiredIdle: You were signed out after 30 minutes of inactivity.
auth.faceSignInHintWithEmail: We'll match your face to the email entered above.
auth.faceSignInHintNoEmail: Scan your enrolled face, or enter your email above for a faster match.
auth.faceSignInModelsFailed: Could not load face models. Check your connection, disable ad blockers for this site, then try again.
auth.faceSignInHoldStill: Hold your face in the frame…
auth.faceSignInNotEnoughSamples: Not enough clear face samples. Use good lighting and try again.
auth.faceSignInEnrollLink: Set up Face ID on your account
auth.faceSignInEmailRequired: Enter your email above before using Face ID sign-in.
auth.faceSignInBlinkHint: You will be asked to blink once (liveness check), then we scan your face.

errors.invalidEmail: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name@example.com).

side.headline: Secure. Smart. <accent>Seamless.</accent>
side.subtitle: Access tickets, manage events, and live a cinematic, AI-driven experience — powered by Face ID and verified everywhere.

auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your inbox.

verify.title: Verify your <accent>email.</accent>
verify.sentTo: We sent a 6-digit code to <0>{{email}}</0>. Enter it below.
verify.newCodeSent: A new code has been sent to your email.

side.title: Check your <accent>inbox.</accent>
side.subtitle: The code expires in 10 minutes. If you don't see it, check your spam folder or request a new one.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a secure link to reset your password.
auth.checkInboxDesc: We sent a password reset link to your email. Follow the instructions to set a new password.

signup.headline: Welcome to the <accent>future</accent> of events.
signup.subtitle: Join FlowTic and experience cinematic, AI-secured events.
signup.individualDesc: You are signing up as a person. Your organizer account is active after email verification (no admin approval).
signup.organizationDesc: Company or legal entity. An admin must approve your documents before you can use creator tools.

side.headline: Join thousands of <accent>event lovers</accent>.
side.subtitle: Create an account and unlock cinematic events, AI-secured Face ID entry, and verified white-market resale.

errors.invalidEmail: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name@example.com).
errors.invalidPhone: Phone must be 11 digits and start with 01 (e.g. 01012345678).
errors.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters and include both letters and numbers.
errors.nationalIdLength: National ID must be exactly {{n}} digits
errors.minAge: You must be at least {{min}} years old to create an account.
errors.orgLocation: Please enter your organization location (city / address).
errors.commercialRegRequired: Please upload a photo of your commercial registration document.
errors.taxCardRequired: Please upload a photo of your tax card document.
errors.commercialRegImage: Commercial registration must be an image.
errors.taxCardImage: Tax card must be an image.
errors.docTooBig: Each document must be under {{mb}} MB.

events.liveCount: {{count}} live experiences, tailored to you in real time.
events.startBackend: Start the backend (port 5000) so the app can reach the API, then refresh.
events.noPublicDesc: This page only shows events with status Active, Cancelled, or Completed. Organizer-created events stay Pending until an admin approves them.
events.noMatchDesc: Try adjusting search or category, or clear all filters.

venues.title: Venues
venues.subtitle: Explore every hall, stadium, and stage where FlowTic events come to life.
venues.emptyHint: Venues will appear here once they are added to the system.
venues.emptySearch: No venues match your search. Try a different name or city.
venues.manageHintOrganizer: You can add new venues for your events.
venues.manageHintAdmin: Add venues for organizers, or edit and delete existing ones.

form.name: Name
form.photoHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP. Max {{mb}} MB.

ticket.title: Purchase <accent>tickets.</accent>
ticket.selectSeatsHint: Interactive map: zoom and pan when a diagram is uploaded. Pick seats below or on the plan. Numbers are used for F&B delivery at the venue.
ticket.selectTicketHint: Pick seats on the diagram and/or by row. F&B delivery uses your seat label. Selected:
ticket.detailsFromAccount: Your name and contact details are taken from your signed-in account.
ticket.paymentCardHint: Pay with a card saved to your account, or enter a new card (stored securely for next time).
ticket.noSavedCards: You have no saved cards yet.
ticket.addCardInProfile: Add a card in your profile
ticket.paymentFailed: Please complete payment details before continuing.
ticket.noTicketsSetup: This event may not have tickets set up yet. Try another event or contact support.
ticket.successSubtitle: Your tickets are ready in your wallet.

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.headline: Your <accent>cinematic</accent> hub.
dashboard.subtitle: Tickets, orders, Face ID and preferences — everything you need to live the event, beautifully organized.

savedCards.title: Saved cards
savedCards.lede: Store up to {{max}} cards for faster checkout. Full numbers are encrypted (AES-256-GCM); only the last four digits are shown here. CVV is never stored — enter it only when you pay.
savedCards.empty: No saved cards yet. Add one to use at checkout.
savedCards.removeDesc: It will be deleted from FlowTic. Masked digits: •••• {{lastFour}}
savedCards.modalDesc: Your card number is encrypted on the server. We never store your CVV.
savedCards.modalNote: Production apps use a certified payments vault; this demo uses coursework-style encrypted storage.
savedCards.maxCards: You can save up to {{max}} cards. Remove one to add another.
savedCards.signInRequired: You are not signed in. Please sign in again to save a card.
savedCards.duplicateCard: This card number is already registered to another account

entryGate.title: Crowd entry — your gate & window
entryGate.intro: Arrive during your time window at the assigned gate. Add friends' ticket IDs so everyone enters the same gate and time (friendly gate entry). If your slot does not work, request a new one — we assign a different gate or time when capacity allows.
entryGate.friendlyHint: Enter one or more friends' ticket numbers (comma-separated). Each friend must already own a ticket for this event. Your whole group is moved to the same gate and window automatically.
entryGate.regenerateHint: Assigns a different gate or time slot for you and everyone linked with you.
entryGate.regenerateMoved: Moved from Gate {{fromGate}} slot {{fromSlot}} → Gate {{toGate}} slot {{toSlot}}.
entryGate.invalidFriendIds: Enter at least one friend's numeric ticket ID (different from yours).
entryGate.linkSuccess: Friendly group aligned to Gate {{gate}}, slot {{slot}} ({{count}} tickets).
entryGate.linkSaved: Friends linked. Everyone needs a sold ticket before we can assign the same gate and time.
entryGate.pendingAwaiting: You have tickets for {{event}}. We're assigning your gate and time window — tap refresh or try again in a moment.
entryGate.pendingNotConfigured: You have tickets for {{event}}, but the organizer has not finished crowd entry setup (gates & time slots). Friendly gate linking will appear here once setup is complete.
entryGate.syncFailed: Could not assign a gate slot yet. The venue may be full — try again later or contact the organizer.

whiteMarket.title:
The resale market.
Trust on tap.
whiteMarket.subtitle: Every listing is identity-bonded, AI-screened for fraud, and instantly transferable via Face ID. Walk in with a glance.

list.priceCapHint: For this ticket, the highest allowed price is EGP {{max}} — what you paid when you bought it. You can list it for less.
list.invalidPrice: Select a ticket and enter a valid price (≥ 0).
list.priceTooHigh: For this ticket, resale price cannot be more than EGP {{max}} (your original purchase price).

food.title: Food & beverage, <accent>in your seat.</accent>
food.subtitle: Pre-order before the lights go down. Skip the line, savor the moment — delivered right to your row.
food.subtitleVenue: Menu for {{venue}} — only restaurants and items for this location.
food.counterPickupDesc: Order ahead and pick up at designated express counters.

foodOrder.accessDenied: You need a ticket before ordering food or beverages.
foodOrder.checkoutSub: Confirm your selection, choose how it reaches you, and pay your way.
foodOrder.deliverySub: Each option has its own fee and arrival window.
foodOrder.paymentSub: Pick how you'd like to pay — saved cards stay end-to-end encrypted.
foodOrder.noSavedCards: Add a saved card from your profile to pay by Visa or Mastercard.
foodOrder.seatFromTicket: Filled from your ticket seat assignment.
foodOrder.seatDeliveryUnavailable: Deliver to seat is not available for your ticket. Pick another delivery option.
foodOrder.payCardDesc: Visa, Mastercard, and debit cards — enter details below or use a saved card.
foodOrder.payCodDesc: Hand the cash to your runner.
foodOrder.toastPreparing: Your order is now being prepared
foodOrder.toastReady: Your order is ready for pickup
foodOrder.successSub: Your order has been confirmed. Order number
foodOrder.selectEvent: Choose an event from your tickets to order food.
foodOrder.noTicketEvents: You need a ticket to an active event before you can order food.
foodOrder.noVendorsForEvent: No F&B vendors are set up for this event yet.
foodOrder.pickEventHint: Select an event above to see its food vendors.
foodOrder.editSub: Make changes before the kitchen starts preparing.
foodOrder.editLocked: This order can no longer be edited because preparation already started.
foodOrder.editLockedTitle: This order can no longer be edited
foodOrder.editWarning: Editing is unavailable once your order moves to Preparing.
foodOrder.pickAnotherItem: Pick another item from the menu
foodOrder.confirmEdit: We'll update your order, recalculate the totals, and re-charge the difference to your selected payment method.
foodOrder.atLeastOne: Keep at least one item in the order

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Your personal details, photo, and account information in one place.
profile.invalidPhotoType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
profile.photoTooLarge: Photo must be 5 MB or smaller.
profile.faceEnrolledHint: Face ID is active on your account for secure venue entry.
profile.faceNotEnrolledHint: Add Face ID for faster, secure check-in at events.
profile.lockedFieldHint: Set at registration and cannot be changed here.
profile.emailChangeHint: Verify your new email after saving.

faceId.addSubtitle: Create a face template for secure venue check-in. Stored as a number on your profile — never as a photo.
faceId.registerSubtitle: We capture a numeric face template in your browser and store it on your account for secure check-in. Raw photos are never uploaded.
faceId.nextStep: Next step after this page: verify your email with the code we sent.
faceId.alreadyEnrolled: Face ID is already enrolled · register again to replace

seating.title: Venue seating map designer
seating.subtitle: Reference image → AI structure → editable form → generated 3D scene (photo is never the rendered map).

organizer.staffHomeDesc: Pick an event with crowd entry enabled. Use this view on a tablet at the gate for jam levels and ticket check-in.

eventDetails.venuePublicOnly: Exact venue name and address are shared with ticket holders after purchase.
eventDetails.venueMapUnavailable: Venue location is not available for this event.

creator.title: Event Creator Dashboard
creator.subtitle: Create and manage your events
creator.verifyEmailBanner: Verify your email to unlock the full FlowTic organizer toolkit.

demographics.title: Attendee Demographics
demographics.noAttendees: No ticket buyers yet. Demographics appear once attendees purchase tickets to your events.
demographics.noAgeData: No date-of-birth on file yet for your ticket buyers.
demographics.noLocationData: No city data yet — attendees can add their city in their profile.
demographics.noTicketData: No sold tickets to analyze yet.

vendors.title: Food & Beverage Vendors
vendors.subtitle: Invite F&B partners for your events. Each vendor gets a login to manage menu and orders at /vendor.
vendors.noEligibleEvents: No eligible events yet. Events must be Active or Completed and linked to a venue before you can add vendors.
vendors.credentialsHint: Share these credentials with the vendor. They sign in at the main site and are redirected to the vendor portal.
vendors.none: No vendors yet. Add one to enable food ordering at your event.

ushers.title: Gate ushers
ushers.subtitle: Hire staff to scan tickets at your gates. Each usher gets a login and can only use gate check-in at posts you assign.
ushers.name: Full name
ushers.credentialsHint: Share these credentials with the usher. They sign in and open the usher gate portal.
ushers.none: No ushers yet. Add one, then assign them to gates after entry setup.
ushers.noGatingEvents: No events with crowd entry enabled yet. Turn on entry gating and set up gates in Gate tools first.
ushers.noAssignments: Not assigned to any gate yet
ushers.gatesLoadError: Could not load gates for this event
ushers.linkedExisting: Existing usher linked to your events
ushers.bulkHint: CSV columns: name, email, phone, age, eventId, gates (e.g. 1|2), shiftStart, shiftEnd
ushers.deactivateConfirm: Remove this usher from your events? Their gate assignments will be cleared.
ushers.eventSettingsHint: Allow manual admit when Face ID fails. Optional PIN required for manual overrides.
ushers.manualFallbackHint: Ushers can log a reason and admit without Face ID when enabled
ushers.overridePinPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current PIN

invitations.title: Guest invitations
invitations.subtitle: Wedding, prom, and private events stay hidden from public listings. Send personalized email invitations with a private link for each guest.
invitations.privateEventHint: This event will not appear on the public events page. After creation, send invitations from the Invitations tab.
invitations.createSuccess: Private event submitted. Send guest invitations from the Invitations tab once approved.
invitations.inviteMessagePlaceholder: You're invited to attend our wedding
invitations.emailFailed: Email could not be sent — copy the invite link instead
invitations.emailNotConfigured: Email is not configured on the server. Set BREVO_API_KEY and EMAIL_FROM in backend/.env, then restart the backend.
invitations.phoneInvalid: Phone must be 11 digits starting with 01
invitations.noPrivateEvents: No wedding, prom, or private events yet. Create one with a private category first.

kind.wedding: Wedding — guests receive a styled invitation with bride & groom names and venue.
kind.prom: Prom — invite-only; guests receive a private link by email.
kind.private: Private celebration — hidden from public discovery.

errors.weddingNames: Bride and groom names are required for wedding events.
errors.promHonoree: Honoree name is required for prom events.
errors.hostNames: Host name(s) are required for private events.

catalogue.title: Event setup catalogue
catalogue.subtitle: Browse centerpieces, hall décor, dance floors, and concert stages. Tap items to select them for your event — choices sync with the create form.
catalogue.hint: Tap a photo or menu card to select it for your event. Selections sync with Choose equipment on the create event form.
catalogue.centerPieceQtyHint: For centerpieces, set how many tables you need. The listed price stays the same — quantity is for your setup plan, not multiplied on the total.
catalogue.flatPriceNote: Catalogue prices are per style; table counts do not increase the estimate.
catalogue.selectCategoryHint: Choose an event category on the create event form. Wedding décor options appear when you select a Wedding category.
catalogue.weddingCategoryHint: Wedding décor (centerpieces, halls, stages, and more) appears when you select a Wedding category. Concert stages and buffet menus stay available below.

buffetSetClassic.name: Set menu — Classic
buffetSetClassic.description: Three seated courses for about 100 guests. Plated service at the table with standard soft drinks.
components: Course 2: grilled chicken or beef with rice, vegetables & sauces
Closing: fruit platter, coffee & soft drinks

buffetSetPremium.name: Set menu — Premium
buffetSetPremium.description: Four-course plated dinner with upgraded mains and a wedding cake table. About 100 guests.
components: Course 2: fish or chicken main with sides
Course 3: beef fillet or lamb tagine with rice & vegetables
Dessert: wedding cake (2 tiers) & petit fours

buffetSetSignature.name: Set menu — Signature
buffetSetSignature.description: Five-course fine-dining style menu with premium ingredients and a staffed dessert station. About 100 guests.
components: Course 2: salad or chilled seafood platter
Course 3: sea bass, beef tenderloin, or stuffed pigeon (guest choice)
Course 4: cheese board or palate-cleansing sorbet
Course 5: dessert trio & chocolate fountain (2 hours)
Drinks: soft drinks, juices & table coffee service

buffetOpenStandard.name: Open buffet — Standard
buffetOpenStandard.description: Self-service buffet lines with hot and cold stations for about 100 guests. Flexible seating.
components: Cold station: salads, mezze, pickles & bread
Hot station: rice, pasta, chicken & meat stew

buffetOpenPremium.name: Open buffet — Premium
buffetOpenPremium.description: Expanded open buffet with seafood, live grill, and an extra dessert bar. About 100 guests.
components: Hot mains: three proteins with seasonal sides
Dessert bar: cakes, konafa & ice cream

buffetOpenGrand.name: Open buffet — Grand
buffetOpenGrand.description: Full open buffet with multiple live cooking stations and premium options. About 100 guests.
components: Egyptian hot line: three mains with sides
Beverages: soft drinks, juices, coffee & welcome drinks

weddingBuffet.title: Wedding — buffet & catering
weddingBuffet.description: Set menus (plated courses) or open buffets. Prices are package estimates for about 100 guests — adjust with your caterer.

hallDecoration.title: Wedding — indoor hall decoration
hallDecoration.description: Venue draping, lighting, and floral installs.

catalogue.unavailableBody: Setup catalogue applies only when you select equipment from FlowTic. Change your hosting option on the create event form.

hosting.legend: What do you need from FlowTic?
hosting.legendHint: Choose how much we provide. Face ID entry and AI crowd gates are available in every option.
hosting.featuresNote: Ticket sales, Face ID check-in, and smart gate assignment work for all options. Configure gates after your event is created.
hosting.externalVenueHint: Where the event takes place — you manage the space; FlowTic handles tickets and entry.
hosting.externalVenuePrivacyNote: City/area is shown on event listings. Venue name and street address are shown only to ticket holders after purchase.
hosting.externalVenueNamePlaceholder: e.g. Private garden, Company HQ hall

ticketing_only.title: Sell tickets only
ticketing_only.description: You have your own venue, equipment, and talent. Use FlowTic for ticketing, Face ID, and gate control.

equipment_only.title: Equipment from catalogue
equipment_only.description: You have a venue. Select setup and equipment from our catalogue.

venue_only.title: Venue from FlowTic
venue_only.description: You have your own equipment. Book a venue listed on FlowTic.

full_setup.title: Venue + equipment
full_setup.description: Select a FlowTic venue and setup options from the catalogue.

errors.externalVenueRequired: Enter your venue name and city/area.
errors.equipmentRequired: Select at least one item from the setup catalogue.
errors.fullSetupEquipmentRequired: Venue + equipment requires at least one catalogue item.

megaStar.enableHint: Add a headline act with set duration and indicative pricing (aligned to 2024 Egypt wedding-market reports). Final fees are negotiated with artists.
megaStar.marketNote: Prices are indicative. Top-tier wedding reports: Amr Diab ~5M EGP, Tamer Hosny ~4M, Hamaki ~3M per set (El Mogaz 2024).

errors.selectionRequired: Select a mega star and performance duration, or turn off the mega star option.

equipment.sectionHint: Open the catalogue, tap photos to select setup options, then return here. Admins will review your selections with the event.
equipment.submitPending: Event submitted for admin review. If approved, you will be notified to pay the setup deposit (includes 10% platform fee) before the event goes live.
equipment.catalogueDisabled: Equipment catalogue is not available for this hosting option.
equipment.platformFeeNote: Includes {{percent}}% FlowTic platform fee on the setup total at checkout.

ticketTypes.required: Add at least one ticket type with a name and price. For non-seated events, quantity must be at least 1.
ticketTypes.duplicateName: Each ticket type name must be unique (remove duplicate rows).

errors.invalidCategory: Could not read the selected category. Please pick the category again from the list.
errors.invalidSchedule: Date or time is invalid. Check the schedule fields and try again.

seatMap.aiHint: Optional: upload a venue diagram and analyze with AI to pre-fill sections (available under Templates and Manual layout).
seatMap.aiApplyOnSubmit: The interactive seat map will be created when you submit the event if ticket types match these sections.
seatMap.needTicketTypesFirst: Add ticket type names above (e.g. VIP, Gold) before building the seat map.
seatMap.generateOnSubmit: Seat map is saved when you create the event (no extra step).
seatMap.aiNoSections: AI did not detect sections. Try a clearer diagram or use a template.
seatMap.successWithMap: Event created with your seat map layout.
seatMap.successWithAi: Event created. Seat map was generated from your AI analysis.
seatMap.successSetupLater: Event created. Open the event page to finish the seat map if needed.

edit.title: Edit event
edit.subtitle: Update details, hosting, equipment, ticket types, and seat map in one place.
edit.forbidden: You can only edit your own events.
edit.name: Event name
edit.seated: Seated event (seat map for F&B delivery)
edit.seatedLocked: Seat map already exists — uncheck seated only after resetting the map below.
edit.ticketQtyHint: Total tickets available per type (not used when a seat map is active).
edit.removeTicketConfirm: Remove this ticket type? If tickets were sold, deletion may fail when you save.
edit.ticketQtySeatMap: Quantities are controlled by the seat map for seated events.

seatMap.title: Seat map
seatMap.subtitle: Define sections and rows, or use a template. Buyers pick seats on the purchase page.
seatMap.notSeatedHint: Enable seated mode to build a seat map for assigned seating and F&B delivery labels.
seatMap.configuredHint: Reset the map below to change layout. Ticket quantities follow the seat map.
seatMap.deleteConfirm: Remove the entire seat map? Buyers will not be able to pick seats until you generate a new one.
seatMap.needTicketTypes: Add at least one ticket type and save before generating a seat map.
seatMap.sectionsRequired: Add at least one section with rows and ticket types.

edit.adminStatusHint: Organizers cannot change status. Use Pending → approve flow or set AwaitingDeposit / Active.

errors.name: Event name is required.
errors.endBeforeStart: End time must be after start time.

deposit.title: Pay setup deposit
deposit.intro: Your event was approved. Pay the deposit below to publish it on FlowTic. The total includes a platform service fee.
deposit.paySuccess: Deposit received. Your event is now live.
deposit.pendingBody: {{name}} is pending approval. You will get a notification when an admin approves or rejects it.
deposit.rejectedBody: {{name}} was not approved. You can create a new event or contact support.
deposit.unavailableBody: This event is not awaiting a setup deposit.

admin.setupDepositDue: Deposit due after approval: EGP {{total}} (incl. {{percent}}% platform fee)
admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Platform management and analytics
admin.growthDescription: New user sign-ups registered on the platform each month.
admin.growthLegend: Each bar = new users that month
admin.healthHint: Month-over-month change vs the previous month in the chart.
admin.healthHoverPrompt: Hover a ring to see full breakdown

createEvent.title: Create a platform event
createEvent.subtitle: Events you create here are published immediately — no organizer approval required.

verticals.title: One platform. <accent>Every kind</accent> of event.
verticals.subtitle: From weddings to bazaars, sports matches to stadium concerts — FlowTic adapts to the moment with cinematic interfaces, AI-secured Face ID, and verified resale.

featured.title: Tonight is <accent>unmissable.</accent>
featured.subtitle: Hand-picked premieres — concerts, weddings, conferences and bazaars curated by our editors and AI engine.

ai.title: Engineered to feel like <accent>the future</accent>.
ai.subtitle: From contactless Face ID gates to AI fraud detection and crowd routing — every interaction is engineered for premium speed and confidence.

faceId.title: Face ID secure entry
faceId.desc: On-device facial recognition unlocks the gate in 400ms — no paper, no phone, no friction.

crowd.title: AI crowd routing
crowd.desc: Real-time gate assignment dissolves lines before they form, keeping every entrance flowing.

recs.title: Concierge recommendations
recs.desc: A taste-aware engine surfaces events you'll love, intelligently personalized after every tap.

resale.title:
The white market.
Trust, on tap.
resale.subtitle: Buy and sell verified tickets with Face ID-bonded ownership. Zero fraud, zero awkward street deals — instant transfer, refundable holds.

points.ai: AI fraud detection on every listing

spotlight.emptyHint: Be the first to list on the White Market, or check back soon.

journey.title: Your evening, <accent>choreographed.</accent>
journey.subtitle: A four-act experience: discover, book, glide past Face ID, and live the moment.

discover.title: Discover
discover.desc: AI-curated picks. Tap, scroll, fall in love.

book.title: Book
book.desc: Reserve in seconds. Pay with one glance.

face.title: Face ID
face.desc: A glance gets you past the gate, paper-free.

enjoy.title: Enjoy
enjoy.desc: Food in-seat. Live the moment, not the line.

q1.quote: The most beautiful event interface I have ever used. Our wedding guests felt like they were inside the future.
q1.author: Salma & Karim

q2.quote: Sub-second Face ID at the gate transformed our concert. 14,000 attendees, zero queues. Surreal.
q2.author: Omar A.

q3.quote: White-market resale finally feels safe. I sold my ticket in 3 taps with zero fees of regret.
q3.author: Mariam H.

ctaPremium.title: Step into the future of <accent>live events</accent>.
ctaPremium.subtitle: Join thousands of hosts and attendees experiencing FlowTic's cinematic, AI-secured event platform.

adminFood.pickVenueHint: Select a venue to manage its restaurants and menu.
adminFood.loadFailed: Could not load venue food data

loyalty.perkEarlyAccess: Book up to {{hours}}h before public sales
loyalty.perkUpgrade: Free one-step ticket upgrade when available
loyalty.redeemSuccess: Promo code {{code}} — use it at checkout
loyalty.promoHint: Enter a code on the ticket payment step.

vendorAdmin.title: F&B vendor accounts
vendorAdmin.subtitle: Create a vendor login, link them to one event, and auto-generate a restaurant at that event's venue.
vendorAdmin.restaurantNameHint: Defaults to vendor name if empty
vendorAdmin.fillRequired: Name, email, and event are required
vendorAdmin.credentialsTitle: Share these credentials with the vendor (shown once)
vendorAdmin.credentialsHint: Ask the vendor to sign in and change their password from profile when that is available.
vendorAdmin.sendCredentialsEmail: Email login credentials to the vendor (requires Brevo in backend/.env)
vendorAdmin.emailNotSent: Email was not sent — check BREVO_API_KEY or copy credentials below.
vendorAdmin.existingVendorHint: This vendor already has an account. They can sign in and switch events in the vendor portal.

vendorDash.noOrders: No orders yet for your stand.
vendorDash.changePasswordHint: Replace the temporary password you received from your organizer.
vendorDash.passwordMin: New password must be at least 8 characters
vendorDash.passwordMix: Password must include both letters and numbers
vendorDash.posEmpty: Tap menu items to build an order

usher.noAssignmentsBody: Your organizer has not assigned you to a gate yet. Contact them to get access.
usher.scanHint: Scan the guest QR, then verify Face ID. Only admit guests assigned to your gate.
usher.scanQrDesc: Point the camera at the guest's FlowTic QR code.
usher.doNotAdmit: Send the guest to their assigned gate.
usher.wrongGateDetail: Guest is assigned to Gate {{assigned}}, not your Gate {{current}}.
usher.noFaceId: Guest has no Face ID — ask them to enroll in the app
usher.holdSteady: Hold the guest steady in frame…
usher.mustChangePasswordHint: You must set a new password before using gate check-in.
usher.changePasswordHint: Use the temporary password from your organizer for the current password field.
usher.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
usher.passwordMix: Password must include both letters and numbers
